description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 3 hrs 55 mins coding, with a daily average of 1 hr 23 mins. His tracked time was mostly in Java, with additional work in Other and Markdown. The data shows activity across 3 projects, but no public GitHub commits, repos, pull requests, or new repositories.
